columns.extraction_plan: The Discussion section on page 6 (Chunk 9) explicitly confirms, "The results of this post hoc analysis of the ARASENS trial, in which all patients received docetaxel, show that darolutamide in combination with ADT and docetaxel increases OS in patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer." This indicates that 100% of patients in the treatment arm received docetaxel. The exact count for the treatment arm is not provided in the given chunks.

The Discussion section on page 6 (Chunk 9) explicitly confirms, "The results of this post hoc analysis of the ARASENS trial, in which all patients received docetaxel, show that darolutamide in combination with ADT and docetaxel increases OS in patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer." This indicates that 100% of patients in the control arm received docetaxel. The exact count for the control arm is not provided in the given chunks.
